title: Yabal #2989
definition:
Jabal = "stream of water"

 1) the son of Lamech by Adah and brother of Jubal; described as the
    father of such as dwell in tents and have cattle
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jabal = "stream of water"

 1) the son of Lamech by Adah and brother of Jubal; described as the
    father of such as dwell in tents and have cattle

    NASB:  a son of Lamech
